description: Letter of appeal from Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi, in the synagogue of the Jerusalemites in Fustat, to a communal dignitary. The letter is signed and dated: 1508 Seleucid, which is 1196/97 CE (1508 Seleucid). Moshe describes how he is a cantor like his father and grandfather and great-grandfather and great-great-grandfather and his paternal uncle, and how the recipient has always bestowed favor on his father and grandfather. Perhaps he wants an official appointment as a cantor in Fustat? Moshe lived much of his life in Qalyūb but was evidently staying in Fustat at this point. ASE.
tags: Moshe b. Levi, Moshe b. Levi (signed)
description_he: מכתב עתירה ממשה ב"ר לוי הלוי, מבית הכנסת של הירושלמים בפוסטאט, אל בעל תפקיד קהילתי. תאריך: שנת 1508 לשטרות = 1196/97 לספירה. משה מתאר כיצד שימש כחזן כמו אביו וסבו וסב-סבו וסב-סב-סבו ודודו מצד האב. אולי מבקש מינוי רשמי כחזן בפוסטאט? ASE.
